allow: Bash(sudo docker compose up -d --force-recreate ingestion-service 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(sudo docker compose build quant-engine options-agent 2>&1 | tail -15)
Bash(sudo docker compose --profile full up -d quant-engine options-agent 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(sudo docker compose build portfolio-service risk-engine 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(sudo docker compose --profile full up -d portfolio-service risk-engine 2>&1 | tail -10)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/watchlist \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"symbol": "NOW"}' | python3 -m json.tool)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/watchlist \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"symbol": "TEST"}' | python3 -m json.tool)
Bash(sudo docker compose exec frontend cat /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf)
Bash(sudo docker compose exec frontend cat /var/log/nginx/error.log 2>/dev/null | tail -10 || sudo docker compose logs frontend --tail=20)
Bash(sudo docker compose exec frontend sh -c "nginx -t" 2>&1; sudo docker compose exec frontend sh -c "tail -5 /var/log/nginx/error.log" 2>&1)
